productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Slipstream Launch and Cacheline High converge at Windglass Relay, banking 134 preserved speed or 175 cargo mastery before generic ascent resumes; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge payoff grapple chroma surge
lastRefinementUnit.result: The first selected payoff grapple now carries mint recovery or amber mastery through the existing cable, probe, spark pool, and fire cue for one bounded descriptor-authored surge.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge payoff grapple chroma-surge feel refinement
lastCompletedUnit.result: Slipstream and Cacheline now carry their selected mint or amber branch energy through the existing payoff grapple cable, probe, spark impact, and fire cue without another presentation or state owner.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, affected JavaScript syntax checks, JSON, and diff checks passed. Playwright completed actual-input safe and shortcut routes through Stormlock, proved four shortcut pressure-vent pulses, latch-hit both payoff targets, preserved 134-speed and 175-cargo Windglass scoring, held bounded DOM/canvas/descriptor/scene/heap behavior, and reported zero console messages. Human View passed the first screen and mint payoff impact with diagnostics closed. Matched 60-tick warm-up plus 180-tick active performance improved from 58.48 to 52.80 ms average tick, p95 improved from 77.2 to 73.8 ms, settled scene nodes stayed at 277, and five follow-up samples showed no steady growth.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Experiments production and publication-receipt commits published to resolved default branch main after fetch-before-push verification; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Give the payoff latch one branch-aware recoil beat—mint forward pull or amber snap—using the existing grapple-latched, camera-trauma, and player-squash owners without new state or events.
